items.name: draggable-marquee
items.title: Draggable Marquee
items.description: Infinite horizontal marquee with drag interaction and momentum physics

items.name: grid-scale
items.title: Grid Scale
items.description: Scroll-driven animation where a centered clip-path panel expands to fullscreen while corner boxes fly in, grid lines dissolve, and floating keyword pills converge to the center.

items.name: helix-slider
items.title: Helix Slider
items.description: Pinned scroll gallery that arranges cards through a helix-like cylindrical path

items.name: horizon-scroll
items.title: Horizon Scroll
items.description: Horizontal storytelling section that converts vertical scroll into a panoramic gallery track

items.name: infinite-perspective-slider
items.title: Infinite Perspective Slider
items.description: Looping perspective gallery with wheel and drag input plus split-text hover reveals

items.name: orbit-slider
items.title: Orbit Slider
items.description: Split circular slider with orbiting titles on one side and image cards on the other

items.name: parallax-footer
items.title: Parallax Footer
items.description: Fixed footer that reveals with a parallax scrolling effect

items.name: parallax-gallery
items.title: Parallax Gallery
items.description: Pinned frame gallery with snapping slides and mirrored thumbnail rails

items.name: parallax-image
items.title: Parallax Image
items.description: Image with smooth parallax scrolling effect using GSAP ScrollTrigger

items.name: parallax-slider
items.title: Parallax Slider
items.description: Pinned horizontal gallery with clip-path reveals and image parallax

items.name: progressive-bloom-valley
items.title: Progressive Bloom Valley
items.description: WebGL particle valley flythrough with scroll-driven camera path, proximity bloom, magnetic flower interaction, film grain, and edge blur post-processing

items.name: rotating-carousel
items.title: Rotating Carousel
items.description: Scroll-driven circular carousel that rotates a ring of editorial cards through view

items.name: rotation-slider
items.title: Rotation Slider
items.description: Scroll-pinned horizontal slider with 3D card rotation, vertical drift, and SplitText caption reveals.

items.name: scroll-distortion
items.title: Scroll Distortion
items.description: Scroll-synced WebGL image transition with displacement distortion and fullscreen typography

items.name: scroll-shuffled-cards
items.title: Scroll Shuffled Cards
items.description: Pinned scroll section that drifts a shuffled stack of editorial cards across the viewport

items.name: scroll-stack
items.title: Scroll Stack
items.description: Successive content cards that hand off focus and fade as the next section enters

items.name: smooth-scroll-animation
items.title: Smooth Scroll Animation
items.description: Three-phase scroll-driven sequence: parallax hero, image flies in with text, 5×5 grid materialises and shrinks hero to a cell, then grid scrolls off while the last image expands into a centred overlay. Powered by GSAP ScrollTrigger with Lenis infinite scroll.

items.name: split-canvas
items.title: Split Canvas
items.description: Scroll-synced canvas transition that reveals images through sliced pixel-grid shutters

items.name: square-translate
items.title: Square Translate
items.description: Scroll-driven list where a rotating square marker tracks progress and nudges nearby rows

items.name: stacking-cards
items.title: Stacking Cards
items.description: Full-screen card sequence that stacks, tilts, and reveals the next scene on scroll

items.name: sticky-content-wrapper
items.title: Sticky Content Wrapper
items.description: Split-screen sticky scroll with content on one side and images on the other, revealing on scroll

items.name: svg-path-marquee
items.title: Marquee on SVG Path
items.description: Animate any content along a custom SVG path. Supports scroll velocity, drag interaction, hover slowdown, and responsive scaling.

items.name: svg-pixel-reveal
items.title: SVG Pixel Reveal
items.description: Scroll-driven image that transitions from pixelated to crisp using an SVG filter and GSAP ScrollTrigger

items.name: text-convergence
items.title: Text Convergence
items.description: Horizontal scroll-driven text marquee where characters fly in from random positions and converge into place as you scroll

items.name: butterfly-trail-cursor
items.title: Butterfly Trail Cursor
items.description: 3D butterfly swarm that spawns around the pointer and fades through space

items.name: coffee-bean-cursor
items.title: Coffee Bean Cursor
items.description: Mouse-reactive 3D coffee bean flow with velocity-based lighting and fluid drift

items.name: colorful-cursor-aura
items.title: Colorful Cursor Aura
items.description: Layered radial color aura that follows the cursor across oversized headline text

items.name: fiddle-ascii-cursor
items.title: Fiddle Ascii Cursor
items.description: Cursor-reactive media grid that swaps nearby cells into a textured ASCII collage

items.name: fish-eye
items.title: Fish Eye
items.description: WebGPU fish-eye lens distortion on images using Three.js TSL node materials with smooth cursor tracking

items.name: inertia-img
items.title: Inertia Image
items.description: Image grid with physics-based inertia and wobble effect on mouse hover using GSAP InertiaPlugin.

items.name: liquid-glass-cursor
items.title: Liquid Glass Cursor
items.description: Fluid glass-like custom cursor with SVG displacement refraction, hover morph states, and GSAP-smoothed tracking.

items.name: noise-ripple-cursor
items.title: Noise Ripple Cursor
items.description: Interactive shader overlay that distorts and dithers an image with fluid cursor ripples

items.name: phantom-image-trail
items.title: Phantom Image Trail
items.description: Cursor-driven image trail that spawns and fades stacked visuals as you move

items.name: pixelated-image-effect
items.title: Pixelated Image Effect
items.description: SVG filter-based image pixelation that reacts to cursor position — pixel size grows and shrinks as you move across the image

items.name: rope-cursor
items.title: Rope Cursor
items.description: Soft trailing rope that lags behind the pointer with a smooth SVG path

items.name: dither-canvas
items.title: Dither Canvas
items.description: Interactive ASCII-style dither canvas with fluid mouse distortion over video

items.name: spider-particles

items.description: Canvas particle network background with connecting lines and mouse-driven repulsion — pure canvas, zero dependencies

items.name: chess-grid-transition
items.title: Chess Grid Transition
items.description: Staggered fullscreen grid wipe that sweeps blocks across the viewport during route changes

items.title: Page Flip Transition
items.description: Angular full-screen route wipe with a folding panel and staggered indicator bars

items.description: Conic-gradient page transition that sweeps a pie-slice mask across the viewport using GSAP, revealing and hiding pages with a smooth rotational wipe

items.name: svg-draw-page-transition
items.title: Svg Draw Page Transition
items.description: Brush-stroke navigation transition that draws a large SVG path across the viewport

items.title: Blur Text
items.description: Text that reveals with a blur-to-focus animation on scroll

items.description: Cursor-following circle mask that reveals hidden text underneath on hover

items.name: mask-text-reveal

items.description: Text reveal animation with gradient mask effect that sweeps across each line on scroll

items.name: overflow-stagger-text
items.title: Overflow Stagger Text
items.description: Characters stagger up from overflow with slight rotation for a dynamic reveal effect

items.name: overflow-text-reveal
items.title: Overflow Text Reveal
items.description: Text lines slide up from hidden overflow with smooth stagger animation on scroll

items.name: perspective-text-reveal
items.title: Perspective Text Reveal
items.description: 3D perspective rotation text reveal with lines flipping into view on scroll

items.name: rectangular-text-reveal
items.title: Rectangular Text Reveal
items.description: Text reveal animation with colored rectangles sliding across each line

items.name: scramble-text
items.title: Scramble Text
items.description: Hacker-style text scramble effect that reveals text character by character on scroll

items.name: slide-text-reveal
items.title: Slide Text Reveal
items.description: Characters slide in from the right with staggered fade animation on scroll

items.name: spotlight-text
items.title: Spotlight Text
items.description: Mouse-tracked spotlight that reveals bright text through a radial gradient mask over dimmed text. Disabled on mobile.

items.name: text-fill-animation
items.title: Text Fill Animation
items.description: Scroll-synced text color fill animation with customizable color sweep effect

items.name: text-hover-expand
items.title: Text Hover Expand
items.description: Expandable text list with hover/click to reveal descriptions and animated corner brackets

items.name: text-stream
items.title: Text Stream
items.description: Infinite vertical text marquee that accelerates and reverses direction based on scroll velocity, with a hard-edge mask and static prefix label

items.name: animated-toggle
items.title: Animated Toggle
items.description: Pure CSS animated icon components: ChevronBird (chevron/arrow), Cross (plus to X), and Plus (open/close). No animation libraries required.

items.name: arrow-fill-button
items.title: Arrow Fill Button
items.description: Button with expanding circle fill and animated arrow icon on hover

items.name: char-stagger-button
items.title: Character Stagger Button
items.description: Link button with staggered character animation on hover

items.name: char-stagger-primary-button
items.title: Character Stagger Primary Button
items.description: Primary button with staggered character animation on hover

items.name: dot-fill-button
items.title: Dot Fill Button
items.description: Button with expanding dot that fills the background on hover with character stagger

items.name: link-button
items.title: Link Button
items.description: Minimal link button with animated underline and rotating arrow icon

items.name: scramble-link-button
items.title: Scramble Link Button
items.description: Link button with text scramble effect on hover, optional underline and arrow

items.name: clippath-slider
items.title: Clip Path Slider
items.description: Fullscreen image slider where transitions sweep via two canvas-drawn radial clip-path arcs. Includes a dual-layer background crossfade, GSAP SplitText line reveals, and a smooth custom cursor that flips direction arrows left/right.

items.name: animated-faq
items.title: Animated FAQ
items.description: Accessible accordion-style FAQ component with smooth GSAP animations

items.name: custom-video-player
items.title: Custom Video Player
items.description: Minimal cinematic video player with timed controls, scrubbing, and mute state

items.name: depth-card-stack
items.title: Depth Card Stack
items.description: 3D stacked card carousel with perspective depth, gyroscopic tilt on hover, texture reveal effect, physics throw animation, and autoplay

items.name: file-encryption
items.title: File Encryption
items.description: Auto-scrolling draggable card marquee with a WebGL laser beam that splits each card between its plain and ASCII/encrypted face, plus Canvas 2D particle scatter.

items.name: form
items.title: Form
items.description: Config-driven contact form with validation for text, phone, select, textarea, and checkbox fields

items.name: gooey-counter
items.title: Gooey Counter
items.description: Canvas-based animated counter that morphs pixel-grid blocks between numbers 0–10 using an SVG gooey filter. Blocks scatter to a random layout between each number with eased transitions.

items.name: hover-slider
items.title: Hover Slider
items.description: WebGL-powered list where hovering a row reveals a vertically-scrolling image stack with circular-arc curvature, velocity-based elastic snap, and GSAP-driven fade/curve transitions.

items.name: hover-stack
items.title: Hover Stack
items.description: Overlapping card stack that fans out around the hovered card

items.name: interactive-list-preview
items.title: Interactive List Preview
items.description: Hover-driven table list that reveals clipped images with a sliding highlight bar and mix-blend-mode difference inversion effect

items.name: modal
items.title: Modal
items.description: Backdrop-blurred fullscreen modal with escape, backdrop, and close-button support

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Animated tabs with a moving active indicator and panel transitions

items.name: testimonial-swiper
items.title: Testimonial Swiper
items.description: Editorial testimonial slider with split-text quote transitions and directional controls

items.name: directional-menu
items.title: Directional Menu
items.description: Mega menu with directional content transitions using GSAP

items.name: full-screen-navigation
items.title: Full Screen Navigation
items.description: Clip-path powered full-screen navigation overlay with animated hamburger transitions

items.name: glass-pill-header
items.title: Glass Pill Header
items.description: Responsive glass-morphism pill navigation with animated dropdowns, GSAP text-swap hover effects, and a collapsible mobile accordion menu

items.name: osmo-menu
items.title: Osmo Menu
items.description: Animated multi-column mega menu with GSAP timelines, square cursor indicators, and hover-fill link transitions.

items.name: cappen
items.title: Cappen Loader
items.description: Stack-to-spread image intro loader with GSAP SplitText word animations and staggered image choreography

items.name: lines-loader
items.title: Lines Loader
items.description: Two GSAP-powered line loaders: staggered horizontal lines wipe from dark to light (Option 1), or a diamond cone that peels away to reveal a hero message (Option 2)

items.name: numeric-tunnel
items.title: Numeric Tunnel
items.description: WebGL loader with a 3D numeric tunnel that crossfades into a chromatic aberration warp effect

items.name: 601-hero
items.title: 601 Hero
items.description: Immersive WebGL hero with a 3D room, interactive TV screen with pixelated video transition, mouse-tracked lighting, edge blur, and film grain post-processing.

items.name: fractal-glass
items.title: Fractal Glass
items.description: WebGL glass-strip refraction effect with fractal distortion, edge blending, and pointer-reactive parallax.

items.name: grid-lift
items.title: Grid Lift
items.description: Interactive lifted grid mask with SVG/text modes, pointer-driven depth, and live Leva controls.

items.name: milkyway
items.title: Milky Way
items.description: GPU-accelerated GPGPU particle galaxy with spiral arms, curl-noise nebula smoke, twinkling sparkle stars, background starfield, and post-processing vignette + edge blur.

items.name: strip-slider
items.title: Strip Slider
items.description: WebGL image slider that splits each slide into vertical strips, transitioning with a staggered wave distortion using Three.js shader materials and GSAP

items.name: webgl-portfolio-slider
items.title: WebGL Portfolio Slider
items.description: Infinite scroll slider with a Three.js WebGL fullscreen plane, cosine zoom distortion, a circular thumbnail ring, and GSAP text transitions

items.name: card-drift
items.title: Card Drift
items.description: Draggable card grid with physics-based throw, velocity tracking, auto-layout, and GSAP Draggable
